name: armada
description: ARMADA — a fleet of Claude Code skills that watch GitHub issues and drive them to merge-ready PRs.

plugins.name: armada
plugins.description: Autonomous Recursive Multi-Agent Development Assembler. Install, then run /armada:commission to self-set-up in any repo. Skills: commission, charter, crows-nest, shipwright, muster, logbook, cartographer, lighthouse (more on the way).
